name: deja-vu
desc: Your agents already solved this. deja finds it — retroactive memory for twelve coding agents: search and MCP recall over the sessions they already wrote, déjà …
descFull: Your agents already solved this. deja finds it — retroactive memory for twelve coding agents: search and MCP recall over the sessions they already wrote, déjà vu moments when you ask again, an audit log of every byte served. One zero-dep binary, fully local.
